diagrams.title: Interrupt Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the complete sequence from interrupt request to ISR execution and return
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the step-by-step interrupt handling process

diagrams.title: Daisy Chain Priority Scheme
diagrams.description: Illustrates devices connected in series for priority resolution
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how daisy chaining establishes interrupt priority based on physical position

diagrams.title: Interrupt Vector Table Structure
diagrams.description: Shows memory organization of interrupt vectors
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how CPU maps interrupt types to their service routines using the vector table

diagrams.title: Polled vs Vectored Interrupt Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of two interrupt identification methods
elements: Polled: CPU checks Device A, B, C sequentially
Vectored: Device provides vector directly to CPU
Time comparison: Polled takes longer with more devices
Hardware: Polled simpler, Vectored needs controller
diagrams.purpose: Comparing efficiency and complexity of interrupt detection methods
